claim_title: Pipeline fragmentation claim is materially supported by repository state

results.description: Verify runner wiring is no longer fragmented across the four structural predicates.
results.command: runner_missing=0; [ ! -f scripts/projections/run_all_projections.py ] && runner_missing=1; calls=$(rg -n "python scripts/pipeline/" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); extra_present=0; for s in 00_prepare_processed_data.py 01a_compute_residual_migration.py 01b_compute_convergence.py 01c_compute_mortality_improvement.py; do [ -f "scripts/pipeline/$s" ] && extra_present=$((extra_present+1)); done; extra_called=$(rg -n "00_prepare_processed_data.py|01a_compute_residual_migration.py|01b_compute_convergence.py|01c_compute_mortality_improvement.py" scripts/pipeline/run_complete_pipeline.sh | wc -l); collision=$(find scripts/pipeline -maxdepth 1 -type f -name "01_*.py" | wc -l); echo "RUNNER_MISSING=$runner_missing"; echo "RUNNER_CALLS=$calls"; echo "EXTRA_PRESENT=$extra_present"; echo "EXTRA_CALLED=$extra_called"; echo "PREFIX_01_COUNT=$collision"; if [ "$runner_missing" -eq 0 ] && [ "$calls" -eq 7 ] && [ "$extra_present" -eq 4 ] && [ "$extra_called" -ge 4 ] && [ "$collision" -eq 1 ]; then echo "ASSERTION=PASS"; else echo "ASSERTION=FAIL"; exit 1; fi
results.stdout:
RUNNER_MISSING=0
RUNNER_CALLS=7
EXTRA_PRESENT=4
EXTRA_CALLED=4
PREFIX_01_COUNT=1
ASSERTION=PASS
